title: SeRANIS and Orbint at Space Tech Expo 2025
excerpt: Leonhard Kessler and Daniel Weinzierl from the Universität der Bundeswehr München presented the SeRANIS Mission and Orbint at the joint booth during Space Tech Expo Europe in Bremen.
body:
Last week, Leonhard Kessler and Daniel Weinzierl from the Universität der Bundeswehr München had the pleasure of presenting the SeRANIS Mission and our spin-off Orbint at the joint booth during Space Tech Expo Europe in Bremen.

Leonhard Kessler (l.) and Daniel Weinzierl (r.) at Space Tech Expo Europe, Bremen
